- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)

## Financial Integrity Zone (FIZ) - Required if FIZ-scoped

- [ ] FIZ: YES/NO
- [ ] REASON documented in commit body
- [ ] IMPACT documented in commit body
- [ ] CORRELATION_ID provided in commit body
- [ ] Idempotency verified
- [ ] Append-only ledger rules followed (no UPDATE/DELETE on ledger_entries)
